stemHtml: In a Fly-By-Wire aircraft, what system has priority over the pitch trim?

options.a: Manual trim has priority over automatic trim, and it will disconnect the autopilot if a certain threshold is reached.
options.b: Manual trim has priority over automatic trim, and it will not disconnect the autopilot if a certain threshold is reached.
options.c: Autopilot has priority over the automatic trim and will not disengage the autopilot if a certain threshold is reached.
options.d: Autopilot has priority over the automatic trim but will disengage if manual trim is commenced over a certain threshold.
